description: An expressionist painting of an outdoor gathering with multiple groups of people seated at blue-toned tables and chairs beneath bare trees. The background is a vivid, intense red, creating a striking contrast with the blue-gray figures and furniture. The people are rendered in loose, sketchy brushstrokes — men and women in dark clothing seated in small groups, some conversing, some eating or drinking. The scene suggests an evening social gathering or outdoor cafe. The bold color contrast between the red background and blue foreground creates a dramatic, almost surreal atmosphere.
